Off Calendar Dec-12-2014 Continued To Jan-26-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Corey for and with Susan Moses (Petitioner).

Mr. Corey stated that there is about $244,000.00 left in the Trust, that he filed two supplements and that he was not aware that Probate Examiner was looking for a third supplement regarding the contingent beneficiaries. Ms. Moses stated that she does not have a receipt for the $20,000.00 gift, that it was twenty years ago, that the cancelled checks have been shredded and that Mr. Shirley passed away a couple of years ago. The Court expressed concern about Joyce (Beneficiary) and noted that the Mother explicitly named a professional fiduciary. Mr. Corey that the fiduciary was named but that he passed away, that there was no back up named, spoke of one of the Sister's medical condition and of family dynamics. The Petition to Appoint Successor Trustee was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
